name: chart/calendar
description: Calendar heatmap — a week-column grid of day cells colored by value (GitHub-style).

meta.name: Calendar
meta.description: Calendar heatmap — a week-column grid of day cells colored by value (GitHub-style).

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltips on hover.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: When true, renders a minimal variant without chart chrome.

props.name: visualMap
props.description: Map day value → CVD-safe colour (continuous or piecewise) via a keyboard-operable legend that filters the visible range.

examples.title: Contribution calendar
examples.code:
import { Calendar } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Calendar
  title="Activity"
  data={[{ day: '2026-01-01', value: 3 }, { day: '2026-01-02', value: 7 }]}
/>

whenToUse: Showing a daily value over weeks/months (activity, contributions)
Spotting weekly/seasonal patterns at a glance
whenNotToUse: Precise daily values — use a LineChart

related.name: Heatmap
related.reason: Use for arbitrary x/y category grids

intent.a11yRationale: Renders role="img" with a title and a fallback day/value table.
